what_it_does: This file is a ledger metadata record for an image asset named pitch-deck/p-08 in the design-source channel, providing identifiers, a blob reference, MIME type, authorship, creation timestamp, and a note that it is a source design ground-truth image.
observations: YAML frontmatter with ledger-style fields for an image asset
id is pitch-deck/p-08 and address uses image://design-source/pitch-deck/p-08
source is design_source_material and author_session is ch-3mpkjg3r
body text states 'SOURCE design ground-truth — pitch-deck/p-08.jpg'
standouts: Image dimensions are recorded as 0x0 despite being a JPEG asset
The file functions purely as a metadata ledger entry rather than containing the image itself
Blob hash is provided but no links to related records
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with a fixed set of metadata keys
Uses URI-style identifiers: image:// for the asset address and blob:// for content addressing
Includes provenance fields: source, author_session, created
concerns: Width and height are 0, which may mean image dimensions were not extracted
No links or relationships connect this asset to other ledger entries
No descriptive fields such as caption, alt text, or tags are present
notes: A sparse metadata ledger card for a pitch-deck source image, with a valid blob reference but missing dimensions and relationships.
questions: Why are the image width and height recorded as 0?
What visual content does pitch-deck/p-08.jpg contain?
Are there related pitch-deck pages or design outputs that should be linked?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose is to record a source design ground-truth image; the file does exactly that as a metadata ledger entry, though it lacks extracted dimensions and relationships.
intention_signals: The file appears to be trying to create a stable, addressable record of an original pitch-deck image asset so it can be referenced and audited within a design-source ledger.
contribution: Provides a content-addressed metadata record for a pitch-deck image source asset, including identifiers, blob reference, MIME type, authorship, and creation timestamp, which a fused system could use to locate and verify the original artifact.
summary_for_embedding: A ledger metadata record for a pitch-deck JPEG image asset in the design-source channel, containing identifiers, a blob hash, MIME type, authorship, creation timestamp, and zero-valued dimensions with no links.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog and provide a stable reference to the original pitch-deck/p-08.jpg design-source image asset.
